notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Strict quality gate passed before benchmarking: raw145 exact token hashes at n64/n256, semantic suite, 16-run arithmetic repeat, and extended sixpack. This run uses the exact MiniMax router-logits path feeding the llm-scaler ESIMD work-sharing INT4 MoE decode kernel, default XPU FlashAttention v2, PIECEWISE XPU graph, block-size 256, max_num_batched_tokens 512, prefix cache disabled, async engine, greedy temperature 0. New detail versus prior result: VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=0. Four p512/n1536 repeats: 82.852197, 82.681455, 82.400523, and 81.682897 output tok/s; mean 82.404268 output tok/s and 109.872357 total tok/s. vLLM benchmark JSON reports total tok/s for prompt+decode but does not expose a separate prefill tok/s metric here. No speculative decoding, no expert dropping, no router approximation, no quality-reducing quant change, no power-limit change.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_WS=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_MINIMAX_LOGITS_WS=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=0 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 VLLM_XPU_FORCE_GRAPH_WITH_COMM=1 VLLM_XPU_GRAPH_NOOP_COMM_CAPTURE=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_NORM_RESTORE_WEIGHT=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_NORM_RESTORE_WEIGHT_MIN_TOKENS=2 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0,1,2,3 ZE_AFFINITY_MASK=0,1,2,3 vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 512 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --async-engine --block-size 256 --no-enable-prefix-caching --compilation-config {"use_inductor_graph_partition":true,"compile_sizes":[1],"cudagraph_mode":"PIECEWISE"}
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; exact MiniMax router-logits to work-sharing u4 MoE path selected by VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_MINIMAX_LOGITS_WS=1; delayed attention allreduce disabled with VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=0; default XPU FlashAttention v2; PIECEWISE XPU graph with communicator capture guard; strict quality hashes preserved; one isolated fresh-cache compile confirmation aborted by startup stall guard and is not counted; no power-limit change
